name: Can I get workers comp if I'm injured during unpaid lunch break?
description: Depends on location. If injured on premises getting lunch (like break room), usually covered. Off-premises lunch = generally not covered.

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if I'm injured during unpaid lunch break?

acceptedAnswer.text: Depends on location. If injured on premises getting lunch (like break room), usually covered. Off-premises lunch = generally not covered.
